preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I knew you were going to do that. I almost did it when he was whispering in your ear, just for your sake!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I would also like you to make another wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, you feel your hands tense up, and once again begin to reach towards your back. You close your eyes and with all your will and might, you just scream "No!" Instinctively, it wasn't even a conscious thought, it was just an animalistic response to feeling your physical form being taken over, and in that moment, every muscle in your body tenses. And you guys watch the smoke momentarily drift from his form behind him.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You don't need to yell at us, Percy. We're just trying to help you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The smoke dissipates or goes behind him?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm aiming at the smoke and just watching and waiting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, you can see this smoke that was once billowing from Percy is now standing in this outer human-like shape.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As it stands there for a moment, it begins to swell and grow larger, filling almost the height of the ten-foot tunnel that you guys are standing in, looming over Percy's body, still connected through his shadow through the floor of the tunnel itself. It just looms over and as it peeks forward, you guys for the first time hear the voice that's been poking through him this entire time just say, "Percival. Do it."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I shoot a holy arrow at it.
